svg.title: Redisson Feature Map
svg.desc: Redisson Feature Map. A catalogue of Redisson features grouped into 5 sections: Data Structures, Concurrency & Messaging, Distributed Services, Integrations & APIs, Deployment & Operations. 14 features are marked PRO, meaning they are available only in Redisson PRO.

g.aria-label: Data Structures. Collections: Map, Multimap, Set, SortedSet, ScoredSortedSet, LexSortedSet, List, Array, Time Series, Vector Set, JSON Store (PRO only), BitVector Store (PRO only).
Data Structures. Objects: Object holder, Binary stream holder, JSON object holder, Geospatial holder, BitSet, RateLimiter, GCRA Rate Limiter.
Data Structures. Queues: Queue, Deque, Priority Queue, Priority Deque, Stream, Ring Buffer, Transfer Queue.
Data Structures. Counters: Id generator, AtomicLong, AtomicDouble, LongAdder, DoubleAdder.
Data Structures. Probabilistic structures: Bloom filter, Cuckoo filter, HyperLogLog, TopK, TDigest.
Concurrency & Messaging. Locks & Synchronizers: Lock, Fair Lock, MultiLock, ReadWriteLock, Semaphore, CountDownLatch, Spin Lock, Fenced Lock.
Concurrency & Messaging. Messaging: Pub/Sub topic, Sharded Pub/Sub topic, JMS API (PRO only), Reliable Queue (PRO only), Reliable Pub/Sub (PRO only).
Distributed Services. Services: Remote service, Live Object service, Executor service, Scheduled executor service, MapReduce service, RediSearch API.
Integrations & APIs. Web Session Management: Apache Tomcat Session, Spring Session, Micronaut Session.
Integrations & APIs. Cache API Implementations: Spring Cache, JCache API (JSR-107), Hibernate Cache, MyBatis Cache, Quarkus Cache, Micronaut Cache.
Integrations & APIs. Microservices: Helidon, Micronaut, Quarkus.
Integrations & APIs. Programming APIs: Reactive Streams API, RxJava3 API, Asynchronous API.

Integrations & APIs. Spring Framework: Spring Boot Starter, Spring Cache, Spring Session, Spring Transaction Manager, Spring Data Redis, Spring Cloud Stream (PRO only), Spring AI Vector Store (PRO only).
Integrations & APIs. Transactions & Batching: Transactions API, XA Transactions (PRO only), Pipelining.
Deployment & Operations. Valkey & Redis Deployments: Single, Sentinel, Cluster, Replicated, Proxy (PRO only), Advanced Replicated (PRO only), Multi Cluster (PRO only), Multi Sentinel (PRO only).
Deployment & Operations. Security & Monitoring: Passwords encryption (PRO only), Observability (PRO only).
